title: Jira vs Monday.com
description: Compare Jira vs Monday.com in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right project management tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Monday.com emerges as our recommendation for most users based on overall performance, feature set, and value. However, Jira is an excellent choice if you prioritize specific features like project management capabilities. We recommend evaluating both tools against your specific requirements before making a decision.

faqs.question: Which is better, Jira or Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Monday.com edges ahead with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.1/5 for Jira. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. Jira excels at The most configurable project management platform for software teams, built for , while Monday.com is stronger for Visual work platform that adapts to any team's workflow with customizable boards.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Jira and Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Jira and Monday.com differ in several key areas: pricing (Free – $15.25/mo per user vs $10–$20/seat/mo), target audience, and core feature focus. Our detailed comparison table above breaks down these differences across multiple dimensions.

faqs.question: Is Jira better than Monday.com for enterprises?
faqs.answer: For enterprise use, Monday.com generally offers more robust features, but the right choice depends on your specific enterprise requirements including security, compliance, and integration needs.

faqs.question: Is Jira cheaper than Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Jira starts at Free – $15.25/mo per user while Monday.com starts at $10–$20/seat/mo. Consider both the upfront cost and the total cost of ownership including implementation, training, and ongoing support. Our team spent 25 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.

faqs.question: Which tool has better integrations, Jira or Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer extensive integration ecosystems, though they focus on different categories. Jira integrates well with project management tools, while Monday.com connects with project management platforms.

faqs.question: Can I use Jira and Monday.com together?
faqs.answer: Yes, many organizations use both tools for different purposes. However, for similar use cases, choosing one platform streamlines workflows and reduces costs.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Jira or Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Both tools are designed with user experience in mind. Jira is known for its intuitive interface, while Monday.com offers comprehensive onboarding resources. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Customer support quality varies. Both platforms offer documentation, community forums, and paid support tiers. User reviews indicate generally positive experiences with both.
